calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Don Sullivan; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 305B).
Appearances:
Daniel M. Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff Jackson Group Property Managment, represented by Nick Scarabrosie.
Jason Pikler, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendants Rachel Kohn Obut and Dana North.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Case settled, parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Entry of Future Judgment", which was filed, but not read into the record.
TRIAL DATE VACATED.
